source_doc.title: A Policy on Geometric Design of Highways and Streets

parameters.name: Decision Sight Distance
parameters.description: Decision sight distance for complex situations

rules.name: SSD - 20 mph Design Speed (AASHTO)
rules.description: Minimum stopping sight distance for 20 mph design speed
rules.error_message: SSD must be at least 115 ft for 20 mph design speed

rules.name: SSD - 30 mph Design Speed (AASHTO)
rules.description: Minimum stopping sight distance for 30 mph design speed
rules.error_message: SSD must be at least 200 ft for 30 mph design speed

rules.name: SSD - 40 mph Design Speed (AASHTO)
rules.description: Minimum stopping sight distance for 40 mph design speed
rules.error_message: SSD must be at least 305 ft for 40 mph design speed

rules.name: SSD - 50 mph Design Speed (AASHTO)
rules.description: Minimum stopping sight distance for 50 mph design speed
rules.error_message: SSD must be at least 425 ft for 50 mph design speed

rules.name: SSD - 60 mph Design Speed (AASHTO)
rules.description: Minimum stopping sight distance for 60 mph design speed
rules.error_message: SSD must be at least 570 ft for 60 mph design speed

rules.name: SSD - 70 mph Design Speed (AASHTO)
rules.description: Minimum stopping sight distance for 70 mph design speed
rules.error_message: SSD must be at least 730 ft for 70 mph design speed

rules.name: SSD - 80 mph Design Speed (AASHTO)
rules.description: Minimum stopping sight distance for 80 mph design speed
rules.error_message: SSD must be at least 910 ft for 80 mph design speed

rules.name: PSD - 30 mph Design Speed (AASHTO)
rules.description: Minimum passing sight distance for 30 mph design speed
rules.error_message: PSD must be at least 500 ft for 30 mph design speed

rules.name: PSD - 40 mph Design Speed (AASHTO)
rules.description: Minimum passing sight distance for 40 mph design speed
rules.error_message: PSD must be at least 600 ft for 40 mph design speed

rules.name: PSD - 50 mph Design Speed (AASHTO)
rules.description: Minimum passing sight distance for 50 mph design speed
rules.error_message: PSD must be at least 1000 ft for 50 mph design speed

rules.name: PSD - 60 mph Design Speed (AASHTO)
rules.description: Minimum passing sight distance for 60 mph design speed
rules.error_message: PSD must be at least 1400 ft for 60 mph design speed

rules.name: PSD - 70 mph Design Speed (AASHTO)
rules.description: Minimum passing sight distance for 70 mph design speed
rules.error_message: PSD must be at least 1900 ft for 70 mph design speed

rules.name: DSD - 50 mph Design Speed (AASHTO)
rules.description: Minimum decision sight distance for 50 mph on freeways
rules.error_message: Decision sight distance should be at least 450 ft for 50 mph

rules.name: DSD - 60 mph Design Speed (AASHTO)
rules.description: Minimum decision sight distance for 60 mph on freeways
rules.error_message: Decision sight distance should be at least 675 ft for 60 mph

rules.name: DSD - 70 mph Design Speed (AASHTO)
rules.description: Minimum decision sight distance for 70 mph on freeways
rules.error_message: Decision sight distance should be at least 975 ft for 70 mph

rules.name: Design Speed vs Speed Limit (AASHTO)
rules.description: Design speed must equal or exceed posted speed limit
rules.error_message: Design speed must be at least equal to posted speed limit

rules.name: Design Speed vs Speed Limit - Freeway (AASHTO)
rules.description: Design speed must equal or exceed posted speed limit
rules.error_message: Design speed must be at least equal to posted speed limit
